chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-347 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10916/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.7430/2025 (return of surety) 18.12.2025 Mr.Sajid Ahmed Memon, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr.Bashir Ahmed Almani, D.A.G ********* 1. Granted. 2. The listed application has been moved by the applicant/surety seeking return of the surety documents. On the last date of hearing, vide Order dated 02.10.2025, this Court directed issuance of Show Cause Notice under Section 514, Cr.P.C., requiring the applicant/surety to explain why the surety bond furnished by him on behalf of the accused should not be forfeited, as the accused, for whom the surety was executed, failed to surrender before the trial Court within the time stipulated in Order dated 05.04.2024. In response, the applicant/surety has submitted his reply, wherein he placed himself at the mercy of this Court and tendered an unconditional apology. Since the surety has submitted himself to the mercy of the Court and the learned D.A.G, present in Court, upon perusal of the file, has recorded no objection. Given the above, the listed application is allowed, with directions to office to return/release the surety furnished by the applicant/surety, however, subject to verification and identification in accordance with law. The Show Cause Notice is also withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
